name: k-skill-browser-runtime
description: Browser runtime adapter for k-skill packages with BrowserOS, Aside, and Chrome CDP providers

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js src/provider.js src/aside.js src/aside-repl.js src/aside-page.js src/aside-locator.js src/cdp.js src/page.js src/stop-rules.js src/runner.js test/runtime.test.js test/runner.test.js
